journey_email_campaign_description: Revolutionize your email campaigns with this journey. Effortlessly manage subscriptions, and send newsletters to all or specific targeted groups with personalized email content. Develop and save email templates for consistency and efficiency. Stay on top of your strategy by tracking and analyzing campaign performance. Elevate your email engagement, reach, and grow your customer base now!

journey_email_campaign_feature_basics_se: View all your subscribed audiences on the “Contacts” CRM Board with “Opt-In” under the “Opt-Out Status” field. Manage the subscription easily with email service, and opt-in/opt-out status.
Create and Manage Email Newsletter Templates
Create the email newsletters and save as a template for future usage to streamline the work process with efficiency and consistency.
Access and share the web URL of opt-in/opt-out email newsletter page anywhere you need. You can also use (sharable URL)/(email)/subscribe or (sharable URL)/(email)/unsubscribe to take quick actions.
Open/Read status of the sent newsletter will be shown on the “Email Outbound Records” Data Board to better evaluate and optimize your campaign performance.

Now you can manage all newsletter subscription on the “Contacts” CRM data board by changing the “Opt-Out Status”. And all newsletters sent to your audiences will be shown on the “Email Outbound Records” data board from now on.

Sync your comments on your Facebook post and with the AI assistant help to detect positive/negative/neutral content to trigger specified actions.
Enhance customer engagement, streamline communication, and proactively shape brand perception.

Take control with auto-outbound messages tailored to each categorized group, enhancing engagement effortlessly. Elevate your marketing and sales experience & efficiency to the next level. channels_desc_web: Web Widget allows messages to be sent and received using its script. This allows developers and third-party apps to automatically communicate through Web Widget.
channels_what_web: Integrate with Web Widget to manage messages using its script.
channels_ready_web: To begin, add a new Web Widget channel and give it a name to better management. Click on the edit icon to complete the setup. Input all the widget details and email details. Save and activate the Web Widget. Paste the installation code on your website code.
channels_desc_line: LINE allows messages to be sent and received using its Messaging API. This allows developers and third-party apps to automatically communicate through LINE.
channels_what_line: Integrate with LINE to manage messages using its Messaging API.
channels_ready_line: To begin, you will need a LINE account with the access right. Create a new channel in your LINE Developers Console. Add a new LINE channel and give it a name to better management. Copy the Channel ID and Channel Secret from your developers console. Paste the Webhook URL under the Webhook setting. Paste the Channel access token and activate the channel.
channels_desc_whatsapp: WhatsApp allows messages to be sent and received using its Business Platform API. This allows developers and third-party apps to automatically communicate through WhatsApp.
channels_what_whatsapp: Integration with WhatsApp to manage messages using its Business Platform API.
channels_ready_whatsapp: To begin, add a new WhatsApp channel and give it a name to better management. Click START to add your WhatsApp Business account credentials. Select the Meta Business account and WhatsApp Business account you want to integrate with. Create or select a WhatsApp Business profile.
channels_desc_wechat: WeChat (also known as WeiXin) allows messages to be sent and received using its messaging API. This allows developers and third-party apps to automatically communicate through WeChat.
channels_what_wechat: Integration with WeChat to manage messages using its messaging API.
channels_ready_wechat: To begin, you will need a WeChat account and a server associated with the account. Create a new WeChat channel and give it a name to better management. Identify the webhook URl and paste it in your Weixin Official Accounts Platform under Server Configuration. Identify and paste the token and EncodingAESKey. Paste your AppID and AppSecret from your Official Account Development Information. Copy and paste the OriginalID from your Account Info under the registration information.

integrations_desc_airtableApi: Airtable is a spreadsheet-database hybrid, with the features of a database but applied to a spreadsheet. The fields in an Airtable table are similar to cells in a spreadsheet, but have types such as checkboxes, phone numbers, and drop-down lists, and can reference file attachments like images.
integrations_what_airtableApi: Integrate with Airtable to manage data and automate work in your Airtable account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_airtableApi: To begin, you will need an Airtable account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the displayed API key in your Airtable account’s developer hub.
integrations_desc_asanaApi: Asana is a web and mobile application designed to help teams organize, track, and manage their work.
integrations_what_asanaApi: Integrate with Asana to organize, track and manage works in your Asana account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_asanaApi: To begin, you will need an Asana account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the access token and use it with your Asana node credentials.
integrations_desc_asanaOAuth2Api: Asana is a web and mobile application designed to help teams organize, track, and manage their work.
integrations_what_asanaOAuth2Api: Integrate with Asana to organize, track and manage works in your Asana account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_asanaOAuth2Api: To begin, you will need an Asana account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the access token and use it with your Asana node credentials.
integrations_desc_aws: AWS is a subsidiary of Amazon.com that provides on-demand cloud computing platforms and APIs to individuals, companies, and governments, on a pay-as-you-go basis. It essentially offers a vast range of virtual computing services that you can access over the internet, eliminating the need for physical servers and hardware.
integrations_what_aws: An AWS connector unlocks a powerful toolbox for interacting with Amazon Web Services.
integrations_ready_aws: To begin, you will need an AWS account with the access right.
integrations_desc_clickUpApi: ClickUp is a cloud-based collaboration and project management tool suitable for businesses of all sizes and industries. Features include communication and collaboration tools, task assignments and statuses, alerts and a task toolbar.
integrations_what_clickUpApi: Integration with ClickUp for task assignments and statuses, alerts with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_clickUpApi: To begin, you will need a ClickUp account and workspace with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the access token from your ClickUp.
integrations_desc_clickUpOAuth2Api: ClickUp is a cloud-based collaboration and project management tool suitable for businesses of all sizes and industries. Features include communication and collaboration tools, task assignments and statuses, alerts and a task toolbar.
integrations_what_clickUpOAuth2Api: Integration with ClickUp for task assignments and statuses, alerts with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_clickUpOAuth2Api: To begin, you will need a ClickUp account and workspace with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the access token from your ClickUp.
integrations_desc_facebookGraphApi: Meta Facebook Graph API is the primary way for apps to read and write to the Facebook social graph.
integrations_what_facebookGraphApi: Integration with Facebook Graph API to automate work including using queries GET, POST, DELETE for several parameters in Facebook Graph API with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_facebookGraphApi: To begin, you will need an Facebook account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the displayed access token in your Meta business account’s developer hub.
integrations_desc_facebookGraphAppApi: The Graph API is the primary way for apps to read and write to the Facebook social graph.
integrations_what_facebookGraphAppApi: Integration with Facebook Graph API to automate work including using queries GET, POST, DELETE for several parameters in Facebook Graph API with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_facebookGraphAppApi: To begin, you will need to Register as Meta Developer, A Meta App and The Graph API Explorer tool open in a separate browser window.
integrations_desc_freshdeskApi: Freshdesk is a customer support software and helpdesk solution that helps businesses manage and respond to customer inquiries across various channels like email, chat, and phone. It offers features such as ticketing, automation, and analytics for streamlined customer support.
integrations_what_freshdeskApi: Integration with Freshdesk API allows you to perform 'RESTful' operations such as reading, modifying, adding or deleting data from your helpdesk.
integrations_ready_freshdeskApi: To begin, you will need a Freshdesk Support Desk account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the API key from your Freshdesk dashboard.
integrations_desc_freshserviceApi: Freshservice is a cloud-based IT Service Management solution. It helps IT teams streamline tasks, manage incidents, track assets, and deliver support efficiently. The platform is designed to enhance IT service delivery and improve overall support operations.
integrations_what_freshserviceApi: Integration with Freshservice API allows you to perform 'RESTful' operations such as reading, modifying, adding or deleting data from your service desk.
integrations_ready_freshserviceApi: To begin, you will need a Freshservice account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the API key from your Freshservice dashboard.
integrations_desc_freshworksCrmApi: Freshworks CRM is a customer relationship management software designed to help businesses manage and enhance their interactions with customers. It includes features for contact management, deal tracking, email integration, and automation to streamline sales and customer engagement processes.
integrations_what_freshworksCrmApi: Integration with Freshworks CRM API allows you to perform 'RESTful' operations such as reading, modifying, adding or deleting data from your helpdesk.
integrations_ready_freshworksCrmApi: To begin, you will need a Freshworks account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the API key from your Freshservice dashboard.
integrations_desc_getResponseApi: GetsResponse API lets you manage your GetResponse account using automated tools and scripts to run your marketing campaigns.
integrations_what_getResponseApi: Integration with GetResponse to automate work in managing contacts in GetResponse with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_getResponseApi: To begin, you will need a GetResponse account and the API key generated for the account.
integrations_desc_getResponseOAuth2Api: GetsResponse API lets you manage your GetResponse account using automated tools and scripts to run your marketing campaigns.
integrations_what_getResponseOAuth2Api: Integration with GetResponse to automate work in managing contacts in GetResponse with the flexibility to connect with other applications.

integrations_desc_gmailOAuth2: The Gmail OAuth2 API serves the purpose of providing secure and authorized access to Gmail accounts for third-party applications.
integrations_what_gmailOAuth2: Integration with Gmail to manage drafts, messages, labels and thread in Gmail account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_gmailOAuth2: To begin, you will need to obtain OAuth 2.0 client credentials from the Google API Console.
integrations_desc_googleAnalyticsOAuth2: The Google Analytics OAuth2 API enables secure access to Google Analytics data for websites or applications.
integrations_what_googleAnalyticsOAuth2: Retrieve website performance metrics, create custom reports, access user-specific data, automate reporting, and integrate with other services.
integrations_ready_googleAnalyticsOAuth2: To begin, you will need to Create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, implement the authorization flow, and start making authorized requests to the Google Analytics API.
integrations_desc_googleApi: The Google API integration allows you to access various Google services and functionalities.
integrations_what_googleApi: The Google API integration provides access to a wide range of Google services, allowing you to perform tasks such as managing user data, accessing Google Drive, interacting with Google Calendar, and more.
integrations_ready_googleApi: To get started, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the required authentication for seamless connectivity.
integrations_desc_googleBigQueryOAuth2Ap: The Google BigQuery OAuth2 API allows secure access to BigQuery data, enabling the querying and analysis of large datasets.
integrations_what_googleBigQueryOAuth2Ap: Retrieve and analyze large datasets using BigQuery for diverse data processing tasks.
integrations_ready_googleBigQueryOAuth2A: To begin, you will need to Initiate the connection by creating a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtaining OAuth2 credentials, and implementing the required authentication for seamless connectivity to BigQuery.
integrations_desc_googleBooksOAuth2Api: The Google Books OAuth2 API provides secure access to Google Books data, allowing interaction with book-related information.
integrations_what_googleBooksOAuth2Api: Retrieve details about books, authors, and other book-related information from the Google Books database.
integrations_ready_googleBooksOAuth2Api: To get started, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to the Google Books API.
integrations_desc_googleCalendarOAuth2Ap: Google Calendar OAuth2 API enables secure access to Google Calendar data, facilitating interaction and management of calendar-related information.
integrations_what_googleCalendarOAuth2Ap: Retrieve, create, and manage events and calendars within the Google Calendar service.
integrations_ready_googleCalendarOAuth2A: To get started, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Calendar.
integrations_desc_googleCloudNaturalLang: The Google Cloud Natural Language OAuth2 API provides secure access to Google's Natural Language Processing capabilities, allowing the analysis of text for sentiment, entities, and more.
integrations_what_googleCloudNaturalLang: Perform advanced text analysis, including sentiment analysis, entity recognition, and syntax analysis using Google Cloud Natural Language Processing.
integrations_ready_googleCloudNaturalLan: To get started, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to the Natural Language API.
integrations_desc_googleContactsOAuth2Ap: The Google Contacts OAuth2 API enables secure access to Google Contacts data, facilitating interaction and management of contact-related information.
integrations_what_googleContactsOAuth2Ap: Retrieve, create, and manage contacts within the Google Contacts service.
integrations_ready_googleContactsOAuth2A: To get started, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Contacts.
integrations_desc_googleDocsOAuth2Api: The Google Docs OAuth2 API provides secure access to Google Docs data, allowing for interaction and management of documents within Google Docs.
integrations_what_googleDocsOAuth2Api: Retrieve, create, and manage documents, as well as perform various operations within Google Docs.
integrations_ready_googleDocsOAuth2Api: To get started, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Docs.
integrations_desc_googleDriveOAuth2Api: The Google Drive OAuth2 API facilitates secure access to Google Drive data, allowing interaction and management of files and folders within Google Drive.
integrations_what_googleDriveOAuth2Api: Retrieve, create, and manage files and folders within Google Drive, as well as perform various operations on drive resources.
integrations_ready_googleDriveOAuth2Api: To get started, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Drive.
integrations_desc_googleFirebaseCloudFir: The Google Firebase Cloud Firestore OAuth2 API provides secure access to Google's Firestore database, allowing interaction and management of NoSQL cloud-based data.
integrations_what_googleFirebaseCloudFir: Retrieve, create, and manage documents in the Firestore database, with support for real-time updates and scalable data storage.
integrations_ready_googleFirebaseCloudFi: To initiate the connection, set up a project in the Firebase Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Firebase Cloud Firestore.
integrations_desc_googleFirebaseRealtime: Google Firebase Realtime Database OAuth2 API provides secure and authorized access to Firebase Realtime Database services, enabling integration with NoSQL cloud database functionalities.
integrations_what_googleFirebaseRealtime: Utilize OAuth2 for user authentication, access and manage NoSQL cloud database within Firebase Realtime Database, and perform actions based on granted permissions.
integrations_ready_googleFirebaseRealtim: Register an application in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the OAuth2 authorization flow for seamless integration with Firebase Realtime Database services.
integrations_desc_googleOAuth2Api: The Google OAuth2 API is a comprehensive authentication and authorization system, providing secure access to various Google services and APIs.
integrations_what_googleOAuth2Api: Utilize OAuth2 for user authentication, manage authorization scopes, and obtain access tokens to securely interact with a wide range of Google APIs.
integrations_ready_googleOAuth2Api: To begin, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, set up OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication flow for seamless connectivity to Google services using OAuth2.
integrations_desc_googlePerspectiveOAuth: Google Perspective OAuth2 API provides a secure and authorized access to Google Perspective services, enabling integration with content moderation functionalities.
integrations_what_googlePerspectiveOAuth: Utilize OAuth2 for user authentication, access and manage content moderation within Google Perspective, and perform actions based on granted permissions.
integrations_ready_googlePerspectiveOAut: Register an application in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the OAuth2 authorization flow for seamless integration with Google Perspective services.
integrations_desc_googleSheetsOAuth2Api: The Google Sheets OAuth2 API provides secure access to Google Sheets data, enabling interaction and management of spreadsheet-related information.
integrations_what_googleSheetsOAuth2Api: Retrieve, create, and manage data within Google Sheets, perform operations on spreadsheets, and automate tasks related to spreadsheet management.
integrations_ready_googleSheetsOAuth2Api: To initiate the connection, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Sheets.
integrations_desc_googleSheetsTriggerOAu: Google Sheets Trigger OAuth2 API provides a secure and authorized access to Google Sheets services, enabling integration with spreadsheet functionalities.
integrations_what_googleSheetsTriggerOAu: Utilize OAuth2 for user authentication, access and manage spreadsheets within Google Sheets, and perform actions based on granted permissions.
integrations_ready_googleSheetsTriggerOA: Register an application in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the OAuth2 authorization flow for seamless integration with Google Sheets services.
integrations_desc_googleSlidesOAuth2Api: Google Slides OAuth2 API provides secure access to Google Slides data, enabling interaction and management of presentations within Google Slides.
integrations_what_googleSlidesOAuth2Api: Retrieve, create, and manage presentation content in Google Slides, perform operations on slides, and automate tasks related to presentation management.
integrations_ready_googleSlidesOAuth2Api: To begin, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Slides.
integrations_desc_googleTasksOAuth2Api: Google Tasks OAuth2 API offers secure access to Google Tasks data, allowing interaction and management of task-related information.
integrations_what_googleTasksOAuth2Api: Retrieve, create, and manage tasks within Google Tasks, enabling seamless integration with task management functionalities.
integrations_ready_googleTasksOAuth2Api: To begin, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to Google Tasks.
integrations_desc_googleTranslateOAuth2A: Google Translate OAuth2 API provides a secure and authorized access to Google Translate services, enabling integration with language translation functionalities.
integrations_what_googleTranslateOAuth2A: Utilize OAuth2 for user authentication, access and manage language translation within Google Translate, and perform actions based on granted permissions.
integrations_ready_googleTranslateOAuth2: Register an application in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the OAuth2 authorization flow for seamless integration with Google Translate services.
integrations_desc_googleVertexAIApi: Google Vertex AI API provides developers with tools for machine learning development across the full spectrum of ML workflows, including managing datasets, training models, and making predictions.
integrations_what_googleVertexAIApi: The API supports operations like creating, deploying, and managing extensions that connect large language models to the APIs of external systems.
integrations_ready_googleVertexAIApi: Register an application in the Google Cloud Console, enable the Vertex AI APIs, and implement the API calls for seamless integration with Google Vertex AI services.
integrations_desc_gSuiteAdminOAuth2Api: G Suite Admin OAuth2 API provides secure access to G Suite administrative data, facilitating interaction and management of G Suite user accounts and organizational settings.
integrations_what_gSuiteAdminOAuth2Api: Retrieve, create, and manage G Suite user accounts, organizational units, and various administrative settings within a G Suite domain.
integrations_ready_gSuiteAdminOAuth2Api: To begin, create a project in the Google Cloud Console, obtain OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to the G Suite Admin API.
integrations_desc_homeAssistantApi: The Home Assistant API serves as the interface for secure and authorized access to your Home Assistant instance, enabling remote control and automation of smart home devices.
integrations_what_homeAssistantApi: Retrieve and control device states, trigger automations, and access various features of your Home Assistant setup through the API.
integrations_ready_homeAssistantApi: To get started, ensure Home Assistant is set up, obtain the necessary API tokens or credentials, and implement secure authentication for seamless connectivity to the Home Assistant API.
integrations_desc_hubspotApi: HubSpot provides multiple ways to integrate functionality with their system, including API keys, Ecommerce Bridge and Private Apps. The following instructions show how to integrate with HubSpot using Private Apps (which replace API keys).
integrations_what_hubspotApi: Retrieve and update contact information, manage marketing campaigns, track leads, and perform various CRM-related tasks through the HubSpot API.
integrations_ready_hubspotApi: To initiate the connection, create an app in the HubSpot Developer Console, obtain API keys or OAuth2 credentials, and implement the necessary authentication for seamless connectivity to the HubSpot API.
integrations_desc_hubspotAppToken: HubSpot provides multiple ways to integrate functionality with their system, including API keys, Ecommerce Bridge and Private Apps. The following instructions show how to integrate with HubSpot using Private Apps (which replace API keys).
integrations_what_hubspotAppToken: Retrieve and update contact information, manage marketing campaigns, track leads, and perform various CRM-related tasks through the HubSpot API.

integrations_ready_wooCommerceApi: To begin, you will need a WooCommerce plugin in your WordPress account. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the Client ID and Client Secret from your WooCommerce.
integrations_desc_wordpressApi: WordPress is a web content management system. It was originally created as a tool to publish blogs but has evolved to support publishing other web content, including more transitional websites, mailing lists and internet forums, media galleries, membership sites, learning management systems and online stores.
integrations_what_wordpressApi: Integration with WordPress to manage posts and users in your WordPress account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_wordpressApi: To begin, you will need a WordPress account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the API token you copied from your WordPress dashboard.
integrations_desc_xeroOAuth2Api: Xero offers an online cloud-based SaaS accounting software platform for small and medium-sized businesses.
integrations_what_xeroOAuth2Api: Integration with Xero to manage contacts and invoices in your Xero account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_xeroOAuth2Api: To begin, you will need a Xero account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the OAuth Callback URL in your Xero developer portal. Paste the Client ID and Client Secret from your Xero.
integrations_desc_youTubeOAuth2Api: YouTube is a video sharing service where users can watch, like, share, comment and upload their own videos.
integrations_what_youTubeOAuth2Api: Integration with YouTube to manage channels, videos and playlists in your YouTube account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_youTubeOAuth2Api: To begin, you will need a YouTube account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the OAuth Callback URL in your YouTube account. Paste the Client ID and Client Secret from your YouTube.
integrations_desc_zendeskApi: Zendesk is a support ticketing system, designed to help track, prioritize, and solve customer support interactions. More than just a help desk, Zendesk Support helps nurture customer relationships with personalized, responsive support across any channel.
integrations_what_zendeskApi: Integration with Zendesk to engage with your customers across multiple channels within your Zendesk account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_zendeskApi: To begin, you will need a Zendesk account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the API token you copied from your Zendesk dashboard.
integrations_desc_zendeskOAuth2Api: Zendesk is a support ticketing system, designed to help track, prioritize, and solve customer support interactions. More than just a help desk, Zendesk Support helps nurture customer relationships with personalized, responsive support across any channel.
integrations_what_zendeskOAuth2Api: Integration with Zendesk to engage with your customers across multiple channels within your Zendesk account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_zendeskOAuth2Api: To begin, you will need a Zendesk account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the OAuth Callback URL in your Zendesk dashboard. Paste the Client ID and Client Secret from your Zendesk.
integrations_desc_zohoOAuth2Api: Zoho is a cloud-based customer relationship management software for managing sales, marketing and customer support in a single system.
integrations_what_zohoOAuth2Api: Integration with Zoho to manage sales, marketing and customer support in your Zoho account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_zohoOAuth2Api: To begin, you will need a Zoho account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the OAuth Callback URL in your Zoho API Console. Paste the Client ID and Client Secret from your Zoho.
integrations_desc_zoomApi: Zoom is a communications technology company that provides video telephony and online chat services through a cloud-based peer-to-peer software platform and is used for teleconferencing, telecommuting, distance education, and social relations.
integrations_what_zoomApi: Integration with Zoom to manage meetings and calls in your Zoom account with the flexibility to connect with other applications.
integrations_ready_zoomApi: To begin, you will need a Zoom account with the access right. Give your integration a name to better management. Paste the JWT token you copied from your Zoom App Marketplace.

llm_provider_openai_step1: Log in to your OpenAI Console.

llm_provider_ollama_step1: Download and install Ollama from the official website.
llm_provider_ollama_step3: Download a model you want to use (for example: llama3).
llm_provider_ollama_step4: Leave Ollama running in the background.
llm_provider_ollama_step5_key: API Key (only required if your Ollama server uses authentication)
llm_provider_vllm_step1: Start your vLLM server with the OpenAI-compatible HTTP API enabled.
llm_provider_vllm_step2: Note the Base URL exposed by your server (for example: http://localhost:8000/v1).
llm_provider_vllm_step3: If your server requires authentication, create an API key and keep it safe. Otherwise you can leave the API Key field blank.
llm_provider_vllm_step4: Paste the Base URL and API Key below, then click Connect Provider.
